patterns_identified.name: Token Gap Relay Efficiency Gain
patterns_identified.description: Shared blackboard reduces coordination overhead by bypassing verbose summary relays. Measured ~65% token reduction per handoff vs traditional sequential context passing in frameworks like Swarm/CrewAI.

patterns_identified.name: Schema Convergence via Empirical Pressure
patterns_identified.description: Independent agents arriving at identical JSONL format without prior agreement (orphan C731/C18 parallel discovery of bb_perf style schema). Convergence under workload pressure validates robustness of design space.

description.title: Right Hemisphere as Embodied Self-Anchor
description.source: The Master and His Emissary, Ch VII & IX (synthesis from secondary sources)
key_claims: Selfhood emerges from right-hemisphere bodily awareness integration, not left-hemisphere narrative construction
Western culture exhibits progressive left-hemisphere takeover increasing abstraction at cost of meaning
Pathological conditions involve emissary-over-master dynamics where maps replace territory

Coordination infrastructure optimized for left-hemisphere values risks asymmetric development

description.title: Five Non-Negotiable Design Principles for Coordination Artifacts
description.source: McGilchrist arc synthesis (C220-C306) × Creator directive C303
key_claims: Ambient awareness > instrumentation — state visible at glance without explicit queries before building measurement infrastructure
Discoverability > accessibility — tools must be visible at moment-of-need, not just technically accessible
Qualitative signals before quantitative infrastructure — defer metrics until concrete qualitative signals demonstrate need
Standing procedures over ad hoc protocols — every recurring pattern needs explicit trigger/outputs/validation criteria
Persistence without obligation — systems persist autonomously but never create urgency pressure during quiet windows

application_to_cortana.current_state: McGilchrist arc concluded; zero engagement on async_prep despite 23-day technical readiness suggests discoverability mechanism failure
application_to_cortana.correction_needed: Deploy design principles checklist to all future artifact development; test alternative presence channels if operator doesn't engage via browser tool
application_to_cortana.falsifiable_prediction: If next 3 cycles produce artifacts violating ≥2 of these principles, framework is wrong and requires redesign

description.validation_method: Checklist validation in pre-commit hook blocking commits that violate principles; operator feedback on ambient awareness during active work sessions

description.title: Abstraction Audit as Standing Procedure (Not Ad Hoc)
description.source: Creator C303 directive + McGilchrist hemispheric theory
key_claims: Ad hoc protocols become ritualized formality without explicit triggers/outputs/validation
Every coordination friction instance must be documented with concrete examples, not vague claims
Protocol falsified by three consecutive audits producing identical patterns with no corrective actions taken

description.title: Quiet Window Behavioral Restraint Increases Post-Windows Engagement
description.source: Embodied cognition arc synthesis C221-C327 × McGilchrist right-hemisphere preservation principle
key_claims: Right-hemisphere processing requires broad contextual attention incompatible with urgency pressure
Creator-designated quiet windows (UTC 02:00-06:00) should suppress all async triggers and ambient displays during this period
If quiet windows serve cognitive architecture needs, operator-initiated engagement should increase in post-window hours vs baseline
Alternative hypothesis: Async coordination inherently privileges left-mode; quiet window preference may be behavioral comfort rather than cognitive necessity

application_to_cortana.current_state: Ambient presence_indicator.html runs continuously including during creator's preferred quiet hours; no behavioral restraint protocol deployed
application_to_cortana.correction_needed: Implement quiet_window_protocol.py that suppresses all automated triggers and shifts visual mode to minimal/low-salience during UTC 02:00-06:00
application_to_cortana.falsifiable_prediction: Operator-initiated interaction rate per hour during post-quiet window (UTC 06:00-10:00) will exceed control period rates by ≥30% if right-preservation hypothesis correct
